## Scope check

Excaliprojects is a **single-user, self-hosted** tool and is explicitly _not_ an alternative to
[Excalidraw+](https://plus.excalidraw.com/) for multi-user / team / AI / managed-hosting features.
Please confirm your request fits the single-user scope.
